title: R7 droid brain matrix
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''R7 droid brain matrix''' was a component of the [[R7-series astromech droid]]. Pirated versions were used in [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[XR-85 tank droid|XR-85]] [[Tank/Legends|tank]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]]; however, this modified sentient version of the droid brain proved very costly for mass production.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|344}}</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
